briefdescription.para: Mailbox of the HTTP connector.
Raw data transfer delay timer.
One day timer.
Flag indicating that connection to HTTP server is established.
Flag indicating that connection to LTE modem is established.

detaileddescription.para: Flag indicating if displacement data calculation is disabled (15 sec FRAM space) or enabled (5 sec FRAM space)

briefdescription.para: Flag indicating that raw data transmission is enabled or not.
Flag indicating that displacement data transmission is enabled or not.
Socket file descriptor.
Buffer to receive responses from webserver.
Buffer to collect the data to be send to webserver.
maximum RMS value in z direction per train
RMS z Threshold.
The starting raw data read position.
Total number of raw data entries.
Number of received raw data entries.
Number of requested raw data entries.
Flag indicating that number of raw data sendings has been exceeded.

detaileddescription.para: Raw data send counter per day

briefdescription.para: Maximum raw data sendings per day from config.
The data header to be send to webserver.

detaileddescription.para: The IMEI as part of the data header
The timestamp as part of the data header. NOTE This timestamp is equal in RMS measurement, raw and displacement messages.

briefdescription.para: HttpConnector task constructor.

detaileddescription.para:
name
The name of the class
The constructor allocate and register a mailbox and allocates and initialize the non cyclic timer with duration of 5 ms and the one day timer with duration and period on one day in seconds. Furthermore the member variables lte_connected, http_connected and bRawTransferEnabled will be initialized with false and member variables dailyRawSendCnt and zMaxRms with 0. Finally the one day timer will be started by callin function start provided by Timer class.

briefdescription.para: HttpConnector task destructor.

detaileddescription.para: The destructor is never called and is implemented only for completion reasons. It simply triggers a debug message on info debug level.

briefdescription.para: HttpConnector virtual task configure function.

detaileddescription.para: The configure function overloads the configure function of the task base class. It retrieves the configuration related to datalog by call of the function getCfgDatalog provided by the Config class and set the flags bDispModeOff, bRawTransferEnabled and bDispTransferEnabled according to the configuration values. Furthermore the activation threshold for raw / displacement data transmission and the displacement calculation is stored in private variable rms_z_Thres and the number of maximum raw data transfers per day in private member variable maxRawPerDay. Finally the private ECDSA key will be retrieved by calling function getPrivateKey provided by class KeyGen. In case the key is valid and do not contains the string "-----INVALID KEY-----" it will be stored in class ECDSASigner by call of setter function setPrivateKey.

briefdescription.para: HTTP connector task function.

detaileddescription.para:
The function directly enters the endless loop and wait for messages. Task wakes up when a message is in the mailbox and read the message by calling mailbox read method which returns the pointer pElem to the message. All expected messages will be handled, in case of an unexpected message an error debug message will be triggered. Finally the message will be released by calling class PoolElem method free, if the pointer pElem is not explicitly set to 0.
Message Handling:
eTimerExpired: On delay timer expiry the ADXL store idle status will be checked again by sending message of type eAdxlIdleReq to AdxlStore task by call of function sendMsg provided by Mbox class. Afterwards the pointer pElem will be set to 0, to prevent releasing the message because it is allocated static.
eOneDayTimerExpired: The counter for raw data sendings per day dailyRawSendCnt will be reset to 0 and the pointer pElem will be set to 0, to prevent releasing the message because it is allocated static.
eLteSleepEnter: Will be ignored, only debug message at info level will be printed.
eLteSleepExit: Will be ignored, only debug message at info level will be printed.
eLteConnected: If LTE is not connected, the flag lte_connected will be set to true. Furthermore Adxl37x task will be requested to enable measurement by call of function sendMsg with message type eAdxlResumeMeas.
eLteDisconnected: The flag lte_connected will be set to false and the member function http_disconnect will be called.
eLteIMEI: The IMEI will be extracted from message payload and stored in member variable imei.
eTimestamp: Timestamp will be extracted from message payload and stored in member variable timestamp
eRawDataStatus: Member function HandleRawDataStatus will be called with message pointer pElem as parameter.
eRawData: Member function HandleRcvdRawData will be called with message pointer pElem as parameter.
eAdxlIdleReq: The received message of type eAdxlIdleReq will be forwarded to AdxlStore task by calling function send provided by Mbox class. Afterwards the pointer pElem will be set to 0, to prevent releasing the message. Releasing the message to the pool is task of the AdxlStore task.
eAdxl37xRmsData: Structure Adxl_xyz_max_data will be extracted from message payload and the maximum value in Z direction will be calculated and stored in variable zMaxRms. Finally the received message will be forwarded to data manager task and the pointer pElem will be set to 0, to prevent releasing the message.
eAdxl37xIdle: Member variable zMaxRms is set to 0.
eAdxlIdleInd: Member function HandleAdxlIdleInd will be called with message pointer pElem as parameter.
eHttpRawDataSend: If LTE is connected and raw data tranfer is enabled, provided by the dynamic configuration the raw data transmission will be started by call of member function StartHttpRawDataTransmission, otherwise a debug message at error level will be printed.
eSendDispDataReq: If LTE is connected and raw data tranfer is enabled, provided by the dynamic configuration the displacement data transmission will be started by call of member function StartHttpDispDataTransmission, otherwise a debug message at error level will be printed and Adxl37x task will be requested to enable measurement by call of function sendMsg with message type eAdxlResumeMeas.
eDispData: Handle the received displacement data (calculate SHA1 hash, send data to remote server, request next data) by calling member function HandleRcvdDispData.

briefdescription.para: Timer expired function for the HTTP connector delay timer.

detaileddescription.para: The function initializes the static pool element e1 with message type eTimerExpired, set HTTP connector as sender and put message into own (HTTP connector's) mailbox.

briefdescription.para: Timer expired function for the one day timer.

detaileddescription.para: The function initializes the static pool element e2 with message type eOneDayTimerExpired, set HTTP connector as sender and put message into own (HTTP connector's) mailbox.

briefdescription.para: Function to create a socket stream and send a HTTP connect request.

detaileddescription.para: The function call the getaddrinfo function provided by Zephyr BSD socket API, which itself is a POSIX wrapper for zsock_getaddrinfo (see details) to retrieve a set of socket addresses and associated information to be used to create a socket. The socket will be created by call of the function socket provided by Zephyr BSD socket API, which itself is a POSIX wrapper for zsock_socket (see details). The returned file descriptor client_fd is then used to setup Transport Layer Security (TLS) if requested protocol is of type IPPROTO_TLS_1_2. Finally member function blocking_connect is called to connect the device to the HTTP host. On success the flag http_connected will be set to true, otherwise function http_connect close the socket and returns immediately.

briefdescription.para: Function to send a disconnect request.

detaileddescription.para: For future use, prints only a debug message at info level.

briefdescription.para: Timer callback function for the HTTP connector delay timer.

detaileddescription.para:
timer
Pointer to timer of type k_timer
The function retrieve the user-specific data from the timer by calling kernel function k_timer_user_data_get and call HTTP connector timer expired function delayTimer_expired.

briefdescription.para: Timer callback function for the one day timer.

detaileddescription.para:
timer
Pointer to timer of type k_timer
The function retrieve the user-specific data from the timer by calling kernel function k_timer_user_data_get and call HTTP connector timer expired function oneDayTimer_expired.

briefdescription.para: Callback function for console input command 'z'.

detaileddescription.para:
The function send a message with message type eAdxlIdleReq, with sender ID eHttpConnector and receiver ID eHttpConnector by calling the method sendMsg provided by the Mbox class.
For testing only: trigger raw data send via shell command

briefdescription.para: Callback function for console input command 'zd'.

detaileddescription.para:
The function send a message with message type eSendDispDataReq, with sender ID eHttpConnector and receiver ID eHttpConnector by calling the method sendMsg provided by the Mbox class.
For testing only: trigger displacement data send via shell command

briefdescription.para: HttpConnector connect function.

detaileddescription.para:
fd
Specifies the file descriptor associated with the socket.
local_addr
Pointer to a sockaddr structure containing the peer address.
len
The length of the sockaddr structure
On success return 0, otherwise -1 and errno set to indicate the error.
The function call the connect function provided by Zephyr BSD socket API, which itself is a POSIX wrapper for zsock_connect (see details). It is called in a loop which ends if function connect returns 0 indicating no error or if error number is EAGAIN (11, see details). Finally function return 0 on success or -1 in case of an error.

memberdef.argsstring: (int fd, uint8_t *buf, uint32_t size, uint32_t flags)
memberdef.name: blocking_send

briefdescription.para: HttpConnector send function.

detaileddescription.para:
fd
Specifies the file descriptor associated with the socket.
buf
Pointer to the buffer containing the message to send
size
The length of the message in bytes
flags
The send flags
On success return the number of bytes sent, otherwise -1 and errno set to indicate the error.
The function call the send function provided by Zephyr BSD socket API, which itself is a POSIX wrapper for zsock_send (see details). It is called in a loop which ends if function connect returns 0 indicating no error or if error number is EAGAIN (11, see details). Finally function return number of bytes sent on success or -1 in case of an error.

memberdef.argsstring: (int fd, uint8_t *buf, uint32_t size, uint32_t flags)
memberdef.name: blocking_recv

briefdescription.para: HttpConnector receive function.

detaileddescription.para:
fd
Specifies the file descriptor associated with the socket.
buf
Pointer to the buffer containing the message to send
size
The length of the message in bytes
flags
The send flags
On success return the number of bytes sent, otherwise -1 and errno set to indicate the error.
The function call the recv function provided by Zephyr BSD socket API, which itself is a POSIX wrapper for zsock_recv (see details). It is called in a loop which ends if function connect returns 0 indicating no error, if error number is EAGAIN (11, see details) or if number of bytes received is more then 300 byte. Finally function return number of bytes sent on success or -1 in case of an error.

briefdescription.para: Function to setup TLS peer verification.

detaileddescription.para:
sock
Specifies the file descriptor associated with the socket.
On success return 0, otherwise -1 and errno set to indicate the error.
The function call the setsockopt function provided by Zephyr BSD socket API, which itself is a POSIX wrapper for zsock_setsockopt (see details). It is called first to setup the peer verification with option TLS_PEER_VERIFY and is called second to setup the TLS security tag with option TLS_SEC_TAG_LIST. Third call is to setup the TLS hostname with option TLS_HOSTNAME, If one of the calls fail the function returns immediatly with the error code returned by setsockopt. If all calls were successful function returns 0.

briefdescription.para: Function to create the raw data header.

detaileddescription.para: The function build the raw data header. To get the same timestamp in RMS message, raw data message and displacement message, the timestamp is send from data manager task to HTTP connector task. This timestamp will than copied in all three messages. RMS message will be send to MQTT broker from data manager task. The header contains the following information: IMEI: IMEI-OF-DEVICE Timestamp: TIMESTAMP no_of_samples: NUM-SAMPLES Type: Raw or Displacement

briefdescription.para: Function to send HTTP POST header to the host.

detaileddescription.para: The function copies the header information into the send buffer and enters a loop. In the loop member function blocking_send is called until all data in send buffer has been transmitted. The header contains the following information: POST / HTTP/1.1(CR)(LF) Host: HOSTNAME+HOSTPATH(CR)(LF) Content-Length: PAYLOAD-LEN(CR)(LF)" \n Content-Type: application/octet-stream(CR)(LF)" (CR)(LF) Where PAYLOAD-LEN is the length of the data header + length of data bytes + length of SHA1 hash (20 bytes)

briefdescription.para: Function to send a single data frame to the host.

detaileddescription.para:
data
The data to be send
datalen
The length of the data in bytes
The function copies the data into the send buffer and enters a loop. In the loop member function blocking_send is called until all data in send buffer has been transmitted.

briefdescription.para: Function to send a single data frame to the host.

detaileddescription.para:
signature
The signature to be send
signatureLen
The length of the signature in bytes
The function initializes the send buffer with zeros, copies the length of the signature into the first byte and the data of the signature string into the send buffer and enters a loop. In the loop member function blocking_send is called until all data in send buffer has been transmitted.

briefdescription.para: Function to request raw data from AdxlStore task.

detaileddescription.para:
msgDataType
The message type specifying the type of data
By calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class the method request data from AdxlStore task with message type of parateter msgDataType. In the payload of the message a structure of type struct AdxlRawDataProgress will be copied by function sendMsg. The structure contains the read position of the first raw data entry, the number of currently received raw data entries and the number of now requested raw data entries.

briefdescription.para: Function to handle received data from AdxlStore task.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
Returns boolean variable bLastFrame, indicating last frame has been send or not
The boolean variable bLastFrame will be initialized with false and the number of still received raw data entries in member variable rcvdEntries will be increased by the number of requested raw data entries. If the total number of entries in adxlStore instance is greater than 0, the SHA1 checksum will be updated with the received raw data by calling function update provided by class Hash, than the received raw data will be send to host in a data frame by calling member function SendSingleDataFrame with the raw data in the message payload and the size of the payload calculated by number of requested entries multiplied with number of bytes of a single raw data entry. If all raw data has been sent, when number of received entries is equal to total number of entries the SHA256 hash checksum will be finalized by calling function finalize provided by class Hash and the signature of the hash checksum will be calculated by call of function signHash provided by class ECDSASigner. The signature will then be send to remote host by calling member function SendSignatureFrame. With call of function blocking_recv the response from remote server will be received, the socket will be closed by calling function close provided by Zephyr BSD socket API and boolean variable bLastFrame will be set to true. Finally bLastFrame will be returned.

briefdescription.para: Function to initiate the raw data transmission to the host.

detaileddescription.para: By calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class the method inform Adxl37x task about the start of raw data transmission before connecting device with host by call of member function http_connect. On success the flag http_connected is true and the method request the raw data status from AdxlStore task by the call of member function reqRawDataStatus. On failure Adxl37x task will be informed about the end of raw data transmission by call of function sendMsg with message type eRawDataTransferComplete and Adxl37x task will be requested to enable measurement by call of function sendMsg with message type eAdxlResumeMeas.

briefdescription.para: Function to request the raw data status from AdxlStore task.

detaileddescription.para: By calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class the method request the raw data status from AdxlStore task with message type eRawDataStatus.

briefdescription.para: Function to request raw data from AdxlStore task.

detaileddescription.para: By calling private member function reqData the function request raw data from AdxlStore task.

briefdescription.para: Function to handle received raw data from AdxlStore task.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
By calling private member function HandleRcvdData the received data from AdxlStore task will be handled by updating signature nad sending data frames to remote HTTP server. If the last frame has been sended, indicated by flag bLastFram, the Adxl37x task will be informed about the end of raw data transmission by call of function sendMsg with message type eRawDataTransferComplete. Afterwards the function checks if displacement calculation is not disabled and in this case it send the message eCalcDisplacementReq to the disp task by calling function sendMsg to request the start of displacement calculation. If not all raw data has been sent, the next raw data will be requested by calling function reqRawData.

briefdescription.para: Function to handle received raw data status from AdxlStore task.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
A structure of type struct AdxlRawDataStatus will be extracted from message payload and the member varaibles startReadPos, totalNumEntries and rcvdEntries will be initialized with the received information respectively 0. Afterwards it starts the SHA1 checksum calculation with call of function init provided by class Hash, before requesting the raw data from AdxlStore task by the call of member function reqRawData. It build the data header by call of member function BuildDataHeader and send HTTP POST header and data header to the remote host with call of the member functions SendHttpPostHeader and SendSingleDataFrame.

briefdescription.para: Function to handle idle indication from AdxlStore task.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
The method checks, if raw data transmission is enabled by configuration and in this case it extract the idle flag from message and start a delay timer if idle flag is false indicating that raw data recording is still in progress. Otherwise it checks if current maximum RMS z value is greater than RMS z threshold and maximum number of raw data sendings per day is not exceeded. Iin this case it starts the raw data transmission by sending message of type eHttpRawDataSend to own (HttpConnector's) mailbox by call of function sendMsg, provided by the Mbox class, otherwise it send message eAdxlResumeMeas to eAdxl37x Task to resume the measurement. If raw data transmission is not enabled, the function checks if displacement calculation is enabled and if current maximum RMS z value is greater than RMS z threshold. In this case it send the message eCalcDisplacementReq to the disp task by calling function sendMsg to request the start of displacement calculation, otherwise it send message eAdxlResumeMeas to eAdxl37x Task to resume the measurement.

briefdescription.para: Function to initiate the displacement data transmission to the host.

detaileddescription.para: By calling function sendMsg provided by Mbox class the method inform Adxl37x task about the start of displacement data transmission before connecting device with host by call of member function http_connect. On success the flag http_connected is true and the method initialize read start position with the FRAM address BW_D_START_ADDR and the variable rcvdEntries with 0. Afterwards it starts the SHA1 checksum calculation with call of function init provided by class Hash, before requesting the displacement data from AdxlStore task by the call of member function reqDispData. It build the data header by call of member function BuildDataHeader and send HTTP POST header and data header to the remote host with call of the member functions SendHttpPostHeader and SendSingleDataFrame. On failure Adxl37x task will be informed about the end of raw data transmission by call of function sendMsg with message type eDispDataTransferComplete.

briefdescription.para: Function to request displacement data from AdxlStore task.

detaileddescription.para: By calling private member function reqData the function request raw data from AdxlStore task.

briefdescription.para: Function to handle received displacement data from AdxlStore task.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
By calling private member function HandleRcvdData the received data from AdxlStore task will be handled by updating signature nad sending data frames to remote HTTP server. If the last frame has been sended, indicated by flag bLastFram, Adxl37x task will be informed about the end of displacement data transmission by call of function sendMsg with message type eDispDataTransferComplete and Adxl37x task will be requested to enable measurement by call of function sendMsg with message type eAdxlResumeMeas. If not all displacement data has been sent, the next displacement data will be requested by calling function reqDispData.

briefdescription.para: HTTP connector class derived from task base class.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para:
HTTP connector task handle the HTTPS connection to send raw data to the remote JOVIA webserver. It uses the BSD socket API provided by Zephyr OS. See details of BSD socket API The HttpConnector class provides functions to request connection, to send raw data via HTTP POST and to receive the server responses. It provides suppport of Transport layer security (TLS) and furthermore provides functions to request and receive the raw data from ADXL Store task, to request the status of the ADXL Store data and to inform ADXL task about running or stopped raw data transmission. Message Interaction:
Receive
Timer interrupt callback
MQTT connector task (self)
LTE connector task
LTE monitor task
ADXL store task
Transmit
ADXL store task
ADXL task
HTTP connector task (self, callback function for shell command 'z')
